title: AAA Particles: World
description: Fancy Effekseer particles, in the Minecraft world!
body:
Adds back the lightning effect in older version of [AAA Particles mod!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aaa-particles)

![Effekseer Lightning](https://imgur.com/abN7tbR.png)

Version 1.0.2 adds a better explosion,  
and enables explosion replacement by default.

**Note;** Users upgrading from versions before 1.0.2 will need to  
manually enable explosion replacement in the mod config,  
in order for the explosion replacement to take effect. ![Effekseer Explosion](https://pic.superbed.cc/item/676505fafa9f77b4dceab0c6.png)

Version 1.0.3 adds loot beam functionality!
![Loot Beam](https://pic.superbed.cc/item/6770bed6fa9f77b4dc337ba0.png)

More in-world effeks coming soon!
